base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_200_plus — a character (boss) from 1997 castlevania symphony of night. ~140 enemies across normal + inverted castle — Skeletons/Zombies/Bone Pillars/Medusa Heads + unique SOTN additions (Scylla/Slogra/Gaibon/Succubus/Beelzebub/Death/Shaft/Dracula). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: ~140 enemies across normal + inverted castle — Skeletons/Zombies/Bone Pillars/Medusa Heads + unique SOTN additions (Scylla/Slogra/Gaibon/Succubus/Beelzebub/Death/Shaft/Dracula)
